params._driverAmount: The amount to be given to the driver.
params._payerAmount: The amount to be refunded to the payer.

actionType().notice: Returns the type of action performed on the ride.

amountPayable().notice: Returns the amount of tokens to be paid to the driver.

cancel(bytes).notice: Cancels the ride. Can only be called by the payer or the driver.

cancellationFeeBps().notice: Returns the cancellation fee rate in basis points (bps).

driver().notice: Returns the address of the driver.

emergencyCancel(uint256,uint256).notice: Cancels the ride in an emergency. Can serve as conflict resolution in case of a dispute. Can only be called by the team.

endCoords().notice: Returns the end coordinates of the ride.

endTime().notice: Returns the end time of the ride.

escrow().notice: Returns the address of the escrow contract.

factory().notice: Returns the address of the factory contract.

feeBps().notice: Returns the fee rate in basis points (bps).

feePaid().notice: Returns the amount of tokens paid as fee.

fulfill(bytes).notice: Fulfills the ride. Needs to be called by both the payer and the driver. Locks the action-type to prevent cancellation.

initialize(address,address,address,uint2.notice: Initializes the ride with the payer, driver, token, amount payable, fee percentage, cancellation fee percentage, start and end coordinates. Can only be called once.

payer().notice: Returns the address of the payer.

startCoords().notice: Returns the start coordinates of the ride.

startTime().notice: Returns the start time of the ride.

status().notice: Returns the current status of the ride.
